title: Function body with multiple statements should not pass linter in 1364-2001 language setting

features.name: function with multiple statements without begin/end
features.description: Code should include a function body containing multiple sequential statements not wrapped in begin/end block

features.name: function with for loop
features.description: Code should include a function containing a for loop

features.name: function with local variable declarations
features.description: Code should include a function with local variable declarations (integer, reg, etc.)

features.name: function with assignment to function name
features.description: Code should include a function that assigns the return value via function name assignment

features.name: 1364-2001 language mode with sv construct
features.description: Code should include use of 1364-2001 language mode combined with SystemVerilog-only constructs that should trigger lint error
